items.description: Bright neon green/red tops with teal wide pants, bold color-blocked streetwear
items.why_not: Too loud for me. I love color but neon on neon feels like it's shouting. I'd rather have one bold piece against neutrals. This feels more like festival wear than everyday.

items.description: Tailored black blazer with black mini skirt and heels, urban chic summer look
items.why_not: Too polished and structured for my daily life. I appreciate it aesthetically but I'd feel uncomfortable. I like when outfits feel lived-in, not posed. This feels like someone else's life.

items.description: Techwear outfit — futuristic green and white with tactical straps and cargo details
items.why_not: Interesting concept but too costume-y for real life. I like anime references that blend into everyday wear, not ones that look like you're about to enter a video game. The straps would annoy me.
